about-company.title: ABOUT COMPANY
about-company.intro: Our company was established to manage waste in an environmentally friendly and legally compliant manner.
about-company.text: We combine many years of experience of our shareholders and associates in waste management and civil engineering. Our knowledge allows for unique optimization of technical solutions and technologies in waste.
about-company.feature1: Our activities focus on reducing landfill waste and recycling those that have not been recycled so far.
about-company.feature2: We implement solutions that protect the environment and support the sustainable development of waste management.
about-company.offer-cta: Check our offer and see how we can help your company with waste management and land reclamation!
realisations.intro: Discover our selected projects and implementations successfully completed for our clients.
realisations.details.carousel.dialog: Fullscreen preview of the realisation image
research.intro: We develop solutions for waste management and land reclamation.
research.highlight: We are also conducting an innovative research project focused on recycling mixed oversize fraction waste, so-called pre-RDF, or waste processed into alternative fuel RDF. The target output after RDF processing is WPC composites in various commercial forms or as granulate. The project received PARP funding and is in the final testing phase.
research.paragraph2: Currently, the only rational way to use light oversize fraction waste such as RDF or pre-RDF is incineration in waste-to-energy plants or cement plants. The project achieved positive results and produced WPC composites with parameters that allow commercial use.
research.captionRdf: Light fraction waste, RDF alternative fuel before processing
research.captionWpc: Waste processed into WPC composite form
research.final: The company has started actions to obtain administrative decisions enabling the launch of a waste recycling installation for code 19 12 10 (RDF) and code 19 12 12 (other).
research.imageGrantAlt: Research project grant board co-funded by PARP
research.imageRdfAlt: Light fraction of RDF alternative fuel before processing

offer.title: Scope of our activity
offer.subtitle: Comprehensive services in waste management, land reclamation, and preparation of environmental investments.
offer.specialization.title: Landfill reclamation
offer.specialization.text: We specialize in the reclamation of landfills for non-hazardous and inert waste, using environmentally safe solutions and enabling waste recovery.

offer.clients.note: We also carry out reclamation as a substitute investor at the owner's expense.
